home.title: Castor
home.tagline: Spin up your projects in one kick.
home.lead: Castor is the team's starting point: a fully dockerized Symfony 8 + Nuxt 4 monorepo with quality gates, tests, observability and the Claude workflow already wired. No more plumbing to redo on every kickoff — you clone, and you ship your first feature within the minute.

docker.title: Everything in Docker
docker.text: The toolchain — PHP, Composer, Node, pnpm — runs entirely in containers. Nothing to install on your machine, the same environment for the whole team and in CI.

quality.title: Non-negotiable quality
quality.text: Format, lint, static analysis (PHPStan level 8), typecheck and tests run as a blocking gate: php-cs-fixer, ESLint, vue-tsc, PHPUnit, Vitest, Playwright. Red = no merge.

observability.title: Production-ready
observability.text: PostgreSQL 18, Sentry for error observability and FR/EN i18n are wired from the start, not bolted on later.

workflow.title: Claude workflow built in
workflow.text: Team standards and the /feature orchestrator live in .claude/ and travel with the project: design → dev → hardening → review, with nothing to install.

home.nextStepLead: This scaffold is already running. To turn it into your project, one command in Claude Code:
home.nextStepNote: It renames the project everywhere, replaces this demo page and drops the mascot — you start from a clean base, ready to code.

home.footer: This page is just a starting point: replace it with your real home — the mascot won't mind.

error.title: Oops, something broke
error.lead: An unexpected error occurred. Head back home and try again.
